heading: Interest
label: 31107 Interest
text: A judgment in a civil action under this chapter may not include interest for the period before the judgment is issued unless the claim is based on a contract providing for interest.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3110746 App.:782 (last sentence words after last comma).(last sentence words after last comma), .Mar. 3, 1925, ch. 428, § 243 Stat. 1112
